title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
summary: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.

title: PACs laud Texas primary wins, look to back more pro-crypto candidates
summary: While crypto industry-backed candidates won runoffs in Texas on Tuesday, industry PACs have less of a stake in California races next week.

title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket
summary: A Google software engineer was charged with insider trading on Polymarket, where he allegedly made more than $1 million betting on one of last year’s most popular Internet searches.

title: BlackRock's Rosenberg on Fed Rates, IALT ETF Strategy
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF (IALT) at BlackRock, explains how the ETF is navigating the current economic environment on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chatbots Could Quietly Pull Users Away From Reality, Researchers Warn
summary: Researchers warn that prolonged chatbot interactions could distort how some users experience reality and social connection.

title: Here's How Much Bitcoin Elon Musk Would Control If SpaceX and Tesla Merge
summary: If Tesla and SpaceX merged—as is a reported possibility—then Elon Musk's combined entity would hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin.

title: Cash App lets users send USDC stablecoins on chains like Solana and Ethereum
summary: Cash App users can now transfer on Solana, Ethereum, Polygon and Arbitrum, but executive Miles Suter says the firm is still bitcoin-focused.

title: White House starts review of CFTC’s prediction markets rulemaking as Trump backs agency authority
summary: The White House is reviewing proposed prediction market rules as President Trump throws his support behind the CFTC.

title: Trump says rising economic costs will not force him into Iran deal
summary: President’s comments come as hopes of an agreement to end the war push oil prices lower

title: Iran’s ultra-hardliners lash out at deal negotiators
summary: Influential conservative lawmakers insist Tehran stick to maximalist terms for ending conflict with Washington
